plugins.name: burn-rate
plugins.description: Claude Code quota burn-rate reporting — % used, pp/hr, projected exhaustion of weekly buckets from ~/.claude/state/usage-log.sqlite

plugins.name: session-sync
plugins.description: End-of-session knowledge sync: summarise learnings, confirm with user, update CLAUDE.md and memory files, commit to git

plugins.name: get-current-time
plugins.description: Gets the current local time using whatever tools are available — user_time_v0, bash date, Desktop Commander, or Windows-MCP

plugins.name: craft-projects
plugins.description: Manage a Craft vault's project notes: create new crochet/knitting project notes from a template, and update project status as work progresses

plugins.name: tg-local-client
plugins.description: Per-project Telegram bot client for agent communication. Configure skill bootstraps a project-local clone with MCP registration, .env token injection, and .gitignore setup. Agent brief covers tools, session startup, and migration from the dex-fabric client.

plugins.name: dex-fabric-grocy
plugins.description: Persistent Grocy inventory bot for the Dex fabric — Telegram-gated, loops on inbound from James, applies Grocy updates and replies
